name: micro-narratives-app
updateContentCommand: [ -f packages.txt ] && sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y && sudo xargs apt install -y <packages.txt; pip3 install --user pipenv; pipenv sync --dev; echo '✅ Packages installed and requirements met'

postAttachCommand.server: pipenv run streamlit run app.py --server.enableCORS false --server.enableXsrfProtection false
